Voice AI

Professional AI Voice Generation

OHGRT is a professional-grade AI voice generation platform for content creators, media companies, and enterprises. Create natural-sounding voices in 10+ languages with studio-quality output.

With advanced voice cloning technology, video dubbing capabilities, and emotion control, OHGRT empowers you to create compelling audio content at scale.

Try OHGRT FreeEnterprise Demo

Features

Powerful Voice AI Capabilities

Everything you need for professional audio production.

Multi-Language TTS

Generate natural speech in Hindi, English, Bengali, Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, and more Indian languages.

Voice Cloning

Clone any voice with just a few minutes of sample audio. Perfect for consistent brand voices and personalization.

Video Dubbing

Automatically dub videos into multiple languages while preserving lip-sync and natural pacing.

Emotion Control

Fine-tune voice emotions - happy, sad, excited, calm, professional. Match the tone to your content.

Studio Quality

44.1kHz, 16-bit audio output with noise reduction. Ready for broadcast and commercial use.

API Access

Integrate OHGRT into your applications with our RESTful API. SDKs available for Python, Node.js, and more.

Use Cases

Who Uses OHGRT

Powering audio for diverse industries and creators.

Media & Entertainment

Dub movies, TV shows, and documentaries into multiple languages for global distribution.

E-Learning

Create voice-overs for educational content in multiple languages without hiring voice actors.

Content Creators

Scale your YouTube and social media content to new audiences with localized audio.

Advertising

Create ad variations for different markets and A/B test voice styles efficiently.

Audiobooks

Convert written content to professional audiobooks with consistent narrator voices.

IVR Systems

Create natural-sounding IVR prompts that enhance customer experience.

Give Your Content a Voice

Start creating professional audio content with OHGRT's AI voice generation. Free to start.
